calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-28-2020 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned by Department 206 for Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Danielle Massell on September 21, 2020, and continued to today, September 28, 2020.
Dept: 514. Judge: Gerardo C Sandoval. Clerk: K. Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3680. Email: gcasey@sftc.org.

Robert S. Kennerd, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Bank of America, N.A.
Katie Hickey, Custodian Records for Bank of America, N.A., was placed under oath and testified.
Ms. Hickey appeared via CourtCall for this morning's proceedings.
No appearance by defendant Danielle Massell.
Plaintiff's Complaint for Common Counts was filed on June 17, 2019.
Default as to defendant Danielle Massell was entered on October 22, 2019.
DOE defendants were dismissed on October 22, 2019.
Defendant Danielle Massell's answer to plaintiff's complaint was filed on October 25, 2019.
Notice of Time & Place of Trial was served on November 4, 2019, setting trial for March 16, 2020.
Plaintiff's Trial Brief was filed on February 19, 2020.
Stipulated Order continuing the trial to June 15, 2020 was filed with the Clerk's Office on March 16, 2020.
Plaintiff's Opening Trial Brief was filed on May 20, 2020.
On June 15, 2020, Department 206 continued the trial date to September 21, 2020, and on September 21, 2020, Department 514 continued this matter to today, September 28, 2020.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Bank of America, N.A., and against defendant Danielle Massell, as follows:

Principal/Damages - $32,296.11 (Amount pled in complaint).
Costs - $714.48.

Total - $33,010.49.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

COURT TRIAL
